evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Background in consulting, professional services, startup or scaleup environments, comfortable moving fast across multiple business domains
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Velocity signals (moving fast across domains, greenfield build) balance against rigour signals ("clean, tested and well-documented SQL", "trusted, analytics-ready"), giving parity.
evidence.domain_risk: build the data foundation that powers decisions for 10,000+ retirement living residents
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Errors would affect business and operational decisions for a retirement living platform but no regulatory, financial reporting, or compliance language is present, placing it at moderate risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: you'll be at the centre of a greenfield Snowflake deployment, designing and building the pipelines, models and data products the whole business will run on
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Explicit greenfield/from-the-ground-up framing and legacy migration indicate the data function is being newly established rather than scaled.
evidence.jd_authorship: Building and maintaining dbt models across bronze, silver, gold and platinum layers, writing clean, tested and well-documented SQL
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise architecture terms (bronze/silver/gold/platinum, Fivetran, Snowpark) give a concrete, specific picture of daily work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: shape how data flows from source systems through to Finance, Sales, Marketing and Operations reporting
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Finance and commercial functions (Sales, Marketing) are named with roughly equal weight as reporting consumers, giving mixed orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: you'll be at the centre of a greenfield Snowflake deployment, designing and building the pipelines, models and data products the whole business will run on
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Strategic ownership of the greenfield build ("This isn't a maintenance role") is paired with execution framing ("take a brief and drive it to completion"), giving mixed autonomy.
evidence.ai_role: Contributing to emerging AI data initiatives as the platform matures
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected to build data infrastructure that supports future AI initiatives, making AI downstream of the candidate's foundational work.
evidence.testing_framing: writing clean, tested and well-documented SQL
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing is mentioned as part of the dbt model-building work but without an explicit ownership/framework framing, placing it as tool_listed rather than a named responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Monitoring and maintaining data pipeline health, troubleshooting issues and ensuring reliability
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Pipeline reliability and health monitoring are a stated concern but secondary to the delivery-focused, greenfield-building framing of the role.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: you'll be at the centre of a greenfield Snowflake deployment, designing and building the pipelines, models and data products the whole business will run on
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The JD explicitly frames the role as greenfield infrastructure build, not maintenance ("This isn't a maintenance role").
evidence.urgency: we will be reviewing applications and contacting candidates on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as early as possible
evidence.loss_aversion: Monitoring and maintaining data pipeline health, troubleshooting issues and ensuring reliability — reflects concern for pipeline stability rather than compliance or stakeholder trust.
